hallucinations.description: Several references cite nonexistent or fabricated papers, including future-dated works and invalid arXiv IDs (e.g., 2026 publication year and arXiv:2601.20026).
hallucinations.evidence: Reference [7]: Vipulanandan, P., Premaratne, K., & Sarkar, D. (2026). Semantic uncertainty quantification of hallucinations in LLMs: A quantum tensor network based method. arXiv:2601.20026.

overall_assessment: The paper contains at least one hallucination in the form of nonexistent citations. The methodology, equations, and reported experimental results appear consistent with the provided source code and plots.
